title: Day 46 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - かのじょが　ミュージカルを　みたいか　どうか、　わかりません。= I don't know whether my girlfriend likes musicals or not.

Sentence 2 - かのじょが　チョコレートが　すきか　どうか、　わかりません。= I don't know whether my girlfriend likes chocolate or not.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
